name: Sour Cream Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13-inch pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine hash browns, onions, soup, honey, salt, black pepper, sour cream, and cheese. Mix well.
4. Place mixture in prepared pan.
5. In a small bowl, combine margarine and crumbs.
6. Top evenly over casserole.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
